calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff NCCS Inc. dba North Coast Collection Service.
Order waiving live testimony was in the court's file.
No appearance by defendant DVDSTATION, Inc. aka DVD Station Inc.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages - $80,723.62
Prejudgment Interest - $32,403.39
Costs - 413.00, for a total of $113,540.01

Judgment was submitted to and signed in open Court.
